title: crazy tnt
description: adds a bunch of new tnt,bombs and more
body:
# 1.0
## landmine
explodes when walked on or by
## nuke
explodes with power of x50 tnt
## unbreakeble tnt
only a player can break it not the explosion
## molotov
places fire IN the block it hits and it breaks bedrock fore some reason
## antimater bomb
spawns tnt and blows up like nuke
## prox tnt
antimater bomb -nuke
## stop watch tnt
freezes ticks for ~2 minutes
## bomb villager
trades stuff for the mod stuff
# 1.1
## nitro
explosive liquid
## napalm
highly flamable
## propane canaster
break it well ur doomed
## methane
more flamable than napalm
## emp
20xtnt
## dynamite
throwable tnt
## charge
u choose the power
## improcharge
buggy
